title: viola walteri
intro: Viola walteri, also known as Walter's violet, is a perennial plant species in the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Viola walteri include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to support overall health.
